waiting_for: Pullback to EMA21 (30105.96) / 30100 psychological level confluence for EMA_BOUNCE long entry

long_assessment.reasoning: Price rallied ~40 points instead of pulling back to the prior EMA21 (30090). EMA21 has risen to 30105.96 and the 30100 psychological level sits just below, creating a confluence support zone. Strong uptrend remains (EMA21 > EMA75 > EMA150). Stochastic at 61.56 is neutral-bullish with room to run. A resting LIMIT order at the EMA21 (30105.96) captures a pullback entry. Stop 46 pts below entry (below EMA75) allows breathing room. Target at prior high 30195 minus 5-pt buffer = 30190. Risk/Reward ~1.8:1 meets minimum threshold.

short_assessment.reasoning: No quality short setup. The nearest bullish FVG below (30073.5-30081.25) is 51 pts away and against a strong uptrend. Stochastic at 61.56 is not overbought, showing no mean-reversion confluence. Psychological level at 30200 above could offer a rejection trade later, but price is 70 pts away with bullish momentum. Counter-trend shorts into a strong EMA-aligned uptrend have low probability.
